active_profile_source: S02 visual/template profile plus S04-S07 argument controls

checks: visual/formal objects cover claims and reader questions
source routes and proof roles are explicit
planned visuals are not counted as rendered evidence

downstream_design_force: S12/S16/rendered gate verify actual figure/table realization

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: required visual/formal support missing for core claim
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: visual density or proof roles insufficient for target profile
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local trace, label, or wording defect that does not alter authority
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential reviewer risk tracked without forced full rerun

anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings enter local revision or risk ledger; they do not force full downstream rerun by default.
